_comment: Rules for turning a selected item base into a rolled instance. Slot counts are the tier power curve: every tier from 1-6 adds a modifier slot, and 6 is the ceiling. Tiers 7-9 hold that ceiling -- their extra power comes from higher base stats and implicits, not more affixes.
_modifier_tier_cap: Which modifier tiers a base may roll. 'item_tier' caps modifier tier at the base's own Tier, so a Crude base can never roll an Apex-magnitude stat. 'unrestricted' lets any base roll any tier, weights alone deciding -- a Tier 1 base could then roll a tier 9 modifier at 0.09% odds.
_distinct_stats: When true a single item never rolls the same stat twice, so six modifiers means six different stats rather than a stack of strength rolls.
